basic_details.job_title: ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 21 Safaiwala, Chowkidar and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS Cell), Station HQ, Mathura Cant, Ministry of Defence
basic_details.total_vacancies: Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist, Dental Officer, Nursing Assistant, Pharmacist, Laboratory Assistant, Laboratory Technician, Dental A/T/H, DEO/Clerk, Female Attendant, Peon, Safaiwala, Chowkidar
basic_details.application_mode: Offline (application format with self-attested testimonials, submitted in duplicate)
basic_details.job_location: ECHS Polyclinic Mathura, Aligarh and Hathras
basic_details.short_information: Station HQ, Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS Cell), Mathura Cant, under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, has released an Employment Notice inviting applications to engage Medical, Para Medical and Non-Medical Staff on a contractual basis in ECHS Polyclinics located at Mathura, Aligarh and Hathras. The engagement is for 11/12 months, renewable for an additional period of one year, or till the candidate attains the maximum age, subject to performance and other conditions. Eligible candidates, including Ex-Servicemen who will be given preference, can submit applications

important_dates.interview_date: Intimated to eligible applicants via mobile/SMS/email as given in the application

application_fee.details: Application fee details are Not Mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Age limit varies by post, ranging from 53 years to 68 years, and is calculated as per the age criteria mentioned against each post in the vacancy table above. Age relaxation details beyond what is stated are Not Mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Varies by post; ranges from Class 8th pass to MBBS/MD/MS with specialty registration

post_wise_qualification.desirable: Merit in MBBS, PG/Other Addl Qualification, five years and above

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS in specialty concerned/DNB, Registration with National/State Council
post_wise_qualification.desirable: Merit in MBBS, merit in PG, Addl Qualification

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS in specialty concerned/DNB, Registration with National/State Council
post_wise_qualification.desirable: Merit in MBBS, merit in PG, Addl Qualification
Merit in BDS, five years and above

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: GNM Dip/CI-1 NA Course (AF), Registration with National/State Council
post_wise_qualification.desirable: Any Dip/Course in Speciality Nursing, experience of ten years and above

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: 'B'/'D' Pharmacy, or 10+2 with Science Stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) plus Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from a Pharmacy Council of India-recognized institute, registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act, 1948
DMLT/CI-1, Lab Tech Course (AF), Registration with National/State Council
B.Sc (MLT)/Diploma in MLT, Registration with National/State Council
post_wise_qualification.desirable: Not Mentioned in the official notification

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: Diploma Holder in Dental Hygiene/Class-1 DH/DORA Course (AF), Registration with National/State Council

post_wise_qualification.desirable: Computer qualification, ten years and above
Ten years and above, First Aid Course
Not Mentioned in the official notification

qualification.details: Note: Candidates holding a Class 8th pass qualification can also explore more 10th Pass Government Jobs, while graduates can check Graduate Government Jobs. Medical professionals may also find relevant openings through Medical Officer Government Jobs listings. | Age limit varies by post, ranging from 53 years to 68 years, and is calculated as per the age criteria mentioned against each post in the vacancy table above. Age relaxation details beyond what is stated are Not Mentioned in the official notification. | Preference will be given to Ex-Servicemen. Reservation for ESM ranges from 60% (for Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist and Dental Officer posts) to 70% (for all other posts), as indicated in the vacancy table.

salary_details.details: Salary varies by post, ranging from Rs. 21,800/- per month for Peon, Safaiwala, Chowkidar and Female Attendant posts to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month for Medical Specialist and Gynecologist posts. Full post-wise salary details are provided in the vacancy table above. For complete terms, conditions and remuneration details, candidates should refer to the official website www.echs.gov.in.

selection_process: Eligible candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview. The date
timing and venue of the interview will be intimated to eligible applicants through the mobile number
email address or SMS provided in the application. Candidates must bring all original certificates
degrees and documents at the time of the interview. No TA/DA will be admissible for attending the interview.
Only candidates meeting the qualitative requirements for the respective post may apply. Selected candidates for OIC
Gynecologist and Dental Officer posts will be required to undergo a mandatory
and must obtain a certificate from the OIC PC before signing the Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) as a contractual employee.
how_to_apply: Visit the official ECHS website (www.echs.gov.in) to download the prescribed application format.
Read the employment notice carefully and check eligibility for the desired post.
Fill in the application form as per the requisite format.
Attach the medical fitness certificate, self-attested by SEMO/CMO.
Attach self-attested photocopies of testimonials in support of education and work experience.
Prepare the application in duplicate (two sets).
Submit the application to OIC, Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Mathura, on or before July 27, 2026, up to 1400 hrs.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted strictly as per the format available on www.echs.gov.in, along with the medical fitness certificate and supporting testimonials, in duplicate. Applications received after 1400 hrs on July 27, 2026, will not be accepted. Interview date, timing and venue will be communicated only to eligible applicants via the mobile number/email provided in the application. Candidates must carry all original credentials, mark sheets, degrees and documents at the time of the interview. No TA/DA is admissible for the interview. Only candidates fulfilling the qualitative requirements for the post may apply. Preference will be given to Ex-Servicemen. Selected OIC, Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist and Dental Officer candidates must complete a mandatory 10-day unpaid On-the-Job Training (OJT) and obtain a certificate before signing the MoA as a contractual employee. The engagement is on a contractual basis for 11/12 months, renewable for an additional one-year period or till the maximum age is attained, subject to performance and other conditions.

content_sections.heading: Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: A total of 21 contractual vacancies are available across Mathura, Aligarh and Hathras ECHS Polyclinics, as per the post-wise breakup below.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Note : Candidates holding a Class 8th pass qualification can also explore more 10th Pass Government Jobs , while graduates can check Graduate Government Jobs . Medical professionals may also find relevant openings through Medical Officer Government Jobs listings. Age limit varies by post, ranging from 53 years to 68 years, and is calculated as per the age criteria mentioned against each post in the vacancy table above. Age relaxation details beyond what is stated are Not Mentioned in the official notification. Preference will be given to Ex-Servicemen. Reservation for ESM ranges from 60% (for Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist and Dental Officer posts) to 70% (for all other posts), as indicated in the vacancy table.

rows.desirable: Merit in MBBS, PG/Other Addl Qualification, five years and above

rows.minimum_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS in specialty concerned/DNB, Registration with National/State Council
rows.minimum_work_experience: Three years in the speciality after PG
rows.desirable: Merit in MBBS, merit in PG, Addl Qualification

rows.minimum_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS in specialty concerned/DNB, Registration with National/State Council
rows.minimum_work_experience: Three years in the speciality after PG
rows.desirable: Merit in MBBS, merit in PG, Addl Qualification
Merit in BDS, five years and above

rows.minimum_qualification: GNM Dip/CI-1 NA Course (AF), Registration with National/State Council
rows.desirable: Any Dip/Course in Speciality Nursing, experience of ten years and above

rows.minimum_qualification: 'B'/'D' Pharmacy, or 10+2 with Science Stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) plus Approved Diploma in Pharmacy from a Pharmacy Council of India-recognized institute, registered as Pharmacist under the Pharmacy Act, 1948
DMLT/CI-1, Lab Tech Course (AF), Registration with National/State Council
B.Sc (MLT)/Diploma in MLT, Registration with National/State Council
rows.desirable: Not Mentioned in the official notification

rows.minimum_qualification: Diploma Holder in Dental Hygiene/Class-1 DH/DORA Course (AF), Registration with National/State Council

rows.desirable: Computer qualification, ten years and above

rows.minimum_work_experience: Five years experience in Civil/Army Health Institution
rows.desirable: Ten years and above, First Aid Course

rows.minimum_work_experience: Not Mentioned in the official notification
rows.desirable: Not Mentioned in the official notification

content_sections.heading: Salary / Remuneration
content_sections.text: Salary varies by post, ranging from Rs. 21,800/- per month for Peon, Safaiwala, Chowkidar and Female Attendant posts to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month for Medical Specialist and Gynecologist posts. Full post-wise salary details are provided in the vacancy table above. For complete terms, conditions and remuneration details, candidates should refer to the official website www.echs.gov.in.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details are Not Mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates will be shortlisted and called for an interview. The date, timing and venue of the interview will be intimated to eligible applicants through the mobile number, email address or SMS provided in the application. Candidates must bring all original certificates, mark sheets, degrees and documents at the time of the interview. No TA/DA will be admissible for attending the interview. Only candidates meeting the qualitative requirements for the respective post may apply. Selected candidates for OIC, Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist and Dental Officer posts will be required to undergo a mandatory, unpaid 10-day On-the-Job Training (OJT), and must obtain a certificate from the OIC PC before signing the Memorandum of Agreement (MoA) as a contractual employee.

content_sections.heading: Required Documents
content_sections.text: Application in the prescribed format (available on www.echs.gov.in) Medical fitness certificate, duly signed and self-attested by SEMO/CMO Self-attested photocopies of testimonials supporting educational qualification and work experience Original certificates, mark sheets and degrees (to be produced at the time of interview)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Visit the official ECHS website (www.echs.gov.in) to download the prescribed application format. Read the employment notice carefully and check eligibility for the desired post. Fill in the application form as per the requisite format. Attach the medical fitness certificate, self-attested by SEMO/CMO. Attach self-attested photocopies of testimonials in support of education and work experience. Prepare the application in duplicate (two sets). Submit the application to OIC, Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Mathura, on or before July 27, 2026, up to 1400 hrs.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted strictly as per the format available on www.echs.gov.in, along with the medical fitness certificate and supporting testimonials, in duplicate. Applications received after 1400 hrs on July 27, 2026, will not be accepted. Interview date, timing and venue will be communicated only to eligible applicants via the mobile number/email provided in the application. Candidates must carry all original credentials, mark sheets, degrees and documents at the time of the interview. No TA/DA is admissible for the interview. Only candidates fulfilling the qualitative requirements for the post may apply. Preference will be given to Ex-Servicemen. Selected OIC, Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist and Dental Officer candidates must complete a mandatory 10-day unpaid On-the-Job Training (OJT) and obtain a certificate before signing the MoA as a contractual employee. The engagement is on a contractual basis for 11/12 months, renewable for an additional one-year period or till the maximum age is attained, subject to performance and other conditions.

content_sections.heading: ECHS Mathura Safaiwala, Chowkidar and More Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF : Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel : Click Here Sarkari Result : Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here Candidates looking for more opportunities in the defence health sector can also explore the latest Ministry of Defence Government Jobs across India. Applicants based in Uttar Pradesh can check the latest Uttar Pradesh Government Jobs available across various departments, while those interested in medical and para-medical roles can browse more Medical Government Jobs and Ex-Servicemen Government Jobs matching their profile.

faq.question: Q1. What is ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026 refers to the Employment Notice issued by Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Mathura Cant, to engage Medical, Para Medical and Non-Medical Staff on a contractual basis at ECHS Polyclinics in Mathura, Aligarh and Hathras.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 21 vacancies are available across 14 posts, including Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Gynecologist, Dental Officer, Nursing Assistant, Pharmacist and other support staff roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application is July 27, 2026, up to 1400 hrs. Applications received after this time will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. How can candidates apply for ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must download the application format from www.echs.gov.in, fill it as per requirements, attach the medical fitness certificate and supporting testimonials, and submit it in duplicate to OIC, Station HQ (ECHS Cell), Mathura.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on an interview. Eligible candidates will be informed of the interview date, timing and venue via mobile, SMS or email.

faq.question: Q6. What is the qualification required for ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Qualification requirements vary by post, ranging from Class 8th pass for Peon and Chowkidar to MBBS/MD/MS with specialty registration for Medical Specialist and Gynecologist posts.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any reservation for Ex-Servicemen in ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, reservation for Ex-Servicemen ranges from 60% to 70% depending on the post, and preference is given to Ex-Servicemen candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for posts under ECHS Mathura Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Salary ranges from Rs. 21,800/- per month for posts like Peon, Safaiwala and Female Attendant to Rs. 1,30,000/- per month for Medical Specialist and Gynecologist posts.

faq.question: Q9. Is TA/DA provided for the interview?
faq.answer: No, TA/DA is not admissible for the interview as per the official notice.

faq.question: Q10. What is the duration of the contractual engagement?
faq.answer: The engagement is for 11/12 months, renewable for an additional period of one year or till the candidate attains the maximum age, subject to performance and other conditions.
